title: Model Platform Change Log
summary: A durable record of prompt, routing, model, retrieval, and infra changes that affect user-facing AI behavior.

steps.title: Capture the change
steps.description: Record what changed, why it changed, and which workflows it touches.

steps.title: Attach evidence
steps.description: Link the relevant eval run, latency movement, cost impact, and any manual approval notes.

steps.title: Publish the release note
steps.description: Share the operator-facing summary so product, support, and leadership know what actually changed.

kpis.metric: Time to reconstruct a regression source

whenToImplement: Once more than one engineer or workflow can change prompt, routing, or retrieval behavior.
delegationNotes: Keep ownership with the platform side of the team so release notes stay technically accurate.
automationNotes: Most fields should be created automatically from CI, release pipelines, and eval runs.
